lines.speaker: Lilly
lines.text: Uh..... hi... didn't see you there. Can.... I help?

lines.speaker: Lilly
lines.text: Erm... yes. When I'm not drinking them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to see what you have for sale.

lines.speaker: Lilly
lines.text: Do you think so? I made it myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? Is that why there's all this cloth and dye around?

lines.speaker: Lilly
lines.text: Yes, it's a hobby of mine when I'm.... relaxing.

lines.speaker: Lilly
lines.text: Have fun and come back soon!
